nevada 10

i chose nevada because it has a desert climate making it ideal for hiking and camping

nevada 10

the great basin desert is a vast and diverse region with numerous unique species of plants and animals its also home to some of the worlds most iconic desert landscapes including the grand canyon

florida 10

louisiana 10

colorado 10
